description: You are optimizing a solar array for Time-of-Use (TOU) electricity rates. Open the project '~/Documents/Energy3D/solar-panel-azimuth-angle.ng3'. Select the existing solar panel array and change its Azimuth angle to exactly 270 degrees (facing West). Change the simulation date to June 21. Run a Daily Yield Analysis (via the Analysis menu or toolbar). Once the graph generates, export the graph data to a CSV file named exactly: '~/Documents/Energy3D/west_facing_yield.csv'. Finally, save the modified scene as a new file named: '~/Documents/Energy3D/tou_optimized.ng3'.
